headline: Virginia Supreme Court hands Republicans an edge ahead of midterms
snapshot: Virginia voters recently approved a new congressional map designed to help give Democrats as many as four additional seats in Congress. But on Friday, the state's Supreme Court narrowly struck down those maps. Ed O'Keefe has details.

live_newsroom.headline: Alabama asks Supreme Court to clear way for Republicans' redrawn voting map
live_newsroom.snapshot: Alabama urged the Supreme Court on Friday for an emergency order clearing the way for its redrawn congressional map that could boost Republicans' chances of holding on to the House in November. sections.headline: Platner points to Ohio GOP defying courts in response to Virginia redistricting ruling

editorial_guards: AI public lead should use a real vetted story whenever available
Monitoring language is blocked from normal public snapshots
Source diversity guard prevents one feed from dominating the page
Authority scoring favors major AI companies, models, infrastructure, policy and enterprise movement
Entertainment scoring favors recognizable studios, platforms, talent, box office, streaming, music, gaming and creator-economy signals
Entertainment fallback language is blocked from normal public leads when verified stories exist
Topic deduplication prevents repeated stories from filling the same public page
Minimum-card logic attempts to fill each vertical with a healthy newsroom mix when enough vetted stories exist
